title: Zendesk Garden
summary: Modular component system for long-lived customer-support workflows, theming and bidirectionality.
lessons: Treat density as a tested mode.
Specify conversation and delivery states explicitly.
caveats: Package maintenance and licensing must be verified per package.
licenseNote: Public documentation; individual packages have their own license metadata.
antiImitationNote: Do not copy Zendesk identity or ticketing information architecture.
